shared.name: TablePreview.tsx
shared.description: The table engine — renders headers, rows, footer, pagination, expand, group, pin.

shared.name: useTablePreview.ts
shared.description: All client-side state + derivations (search/sort/filter/group/select/expand/resize).

shared.name: types.ts
shared.description: TableBuilderConfig + TableColumnConfig + AggregationType + renderer/API contracts.

shared.name: cellJsRunner.ts
shared.description: Sandboxed per-cell JS handler runner used by columns whose clickAction.type === "js". Also reused by the kanban dialog runner.

shared.name: rowDialogTemplate.ts
shared.description: Mustache-style template + sanitizer used by row dialogs (table) and card dialogs (kanban).

shared.name: table.tsx
shared.description: shadcn/ui Table primitives.

shared.name: VariantJsonConfigPanel.tsx
shared.description: Collapsible JSON config viewer rendered next to TablePreview (shared with form/kanban builder previews).

shared.name: defaultCellRenderer.tsx
shared.description: Built-in rich cell renderer (badge/progress/avatar/select/switch/actions) — fallback when no column.renderCell or config.renderCell is set.

shared.name: defaultExpandedRowRenderer.tsx
shared.description: Default expandable-row body (switches between layouts) — fallback when config.renderExpandedRow is not provided.

shared.name: defaultPaginationBar.tsx
shared.description: Default pagination bar (every paginationLayout) — fallback when config.renderPagination is not provided.

shared.name: defaultRowDialog.tsx
shared.description: Default row-detail dialog body — fallback when rowClickAction.renderDialog / dialogTemplate are not provided.

shared.name: tableServices.ts
shared.description: Network layer for row-action API calls — token interpolation + fetch + result envelope. No React.

shared.name: useRowApiActions.hook.ts
shared.description: Hook gluing tableServices to React state — optimistic cell update, rollback, toast, button row-actions.

shared.name: attachRenderers.ts
shared.description: O(n) helper that wires per-column cell renderers onto a TableBuilderConfig.columns array.

shared.name: dnd/index.ts
shared.code:
/**
 * Custom Pointer DnD library — public surface.
 *
 * A lightweight, pointer-event–based drag-and-drop primitive. More advanced
 * than the browser's native HTML5 drag API in several ways:
 *
 *   - **No flicker.** A single React state update per drop-slot change.
 *   - **Custom overlay.** A real React node follows the cursor.
 *   - **Activation distance.** Plain clicks still fire (>5px to start drag).
 *   - **Touch + mouse + pen** via Pointer Events.
 *   - **Axis-aware autoscroll** (vertical, horizontal, or both).
 *   - **Axis-aware index resolution** for vertical and horizontal lists.
 *   - **Escape to cancel.**
 *   - **Type-safe payloads** via generics.
 *
 * Used by: kanban board, table-builder row reorder + column reorder,
 * page-builder canvas, and anywhere else in the codebase that needs DnD.
 * Replaces all `@dnd-kit/*` usage.
 */
export { DndProvider, useDndContext } from "./DndContext";
export { useDraggable } from "./useDraggable";
export { useDropZone } from "./useDropZone";
export { DropIndicator } from "./DropIndicator";
export type {
  DragData,
  DragSnapshot,
  DropResult,
  HoverState,
  UseDraggableOptions,
  UseDropZoneOptions,
  ZoneRegistration,
  DndContextValue,
} from "./types";
shared.description: Custom Pointer DnD — public surface (no @dnd-kit dependency).

shared.name: dnd/DndContext.tsx
shared.description: DnD provider with autoscroll, prefers-reduced-motion, RTL index resolution.

shared.name: dnd/useDraggable.ts
shared.description: Draggable hook with activation distance + custom React preview.

shared.name: dnd/useDropZone.ts
shared.description: DropZone hook with animated sibling 'make room' translation.

shared.name: dnd/DropIndicator.tsx
shared.description: Visual ghost-slot indicator at the computed insertion index.

shared.name: dnd/types.ts
shared.description: Shared DnD type contracts.

shared.name: dnd/dnd.css
shared.description: DnD overlay/indicator animations + cursor styles. @import once at app entry.
